title: Bagus Mob
description: This mod add unique mobs! such as illager!
body:
# Bagus Mob

(This mod include wasabi mod's mobs! if you want old one. use [wasabi mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/wasabi)!)

![Piglins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VfYVtIpr/images/c0073c4cc85811e5fcde29b36a631d6a535435a7.png)
 

## Summary

This mod is add various mobs such as Illager... but not only!

Compat mobs planning too!

 

## Include mob

### Ninjar-


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This mob from my old mod wasabi mod

This illager not only the melee, sometime avoid attack and teleport like ninja!

Ninjar drop the ninja armor(This armor cannot notice from mob... unless you too near from them)

dampens Vibrations when ninjar is invisible

ninjar sneaking and invisible while target is not found!

They also Spawn in Illager Castle!

</details>



### Tengu


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This mob from my old mod wasabi mod

This illager flying for you!

and when he attack you will push away!

But when he hit on projectile. fall on ground!

They also Spawn in Illager Castle!

</details>



### Rude Hog(from Hunter's Return)


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This piglin is Respects piglins for hunting long ago(such as minecraft Legend's "beast".... or he only respect his hunt not him self)

They mainly hunt and have a strong sense of leadership over piglins.

He resents the old events of his ancestors, and he shows no mercy to anyone who disparages his comrades or his weapons.


</details>


 

They spawn in bastion and sometime nether wastes with hunter boar

### Burner Hog

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


He admires the equipment of the leaders from a long time ago(He is not admire the old leader it self), and is mainly the leader of the bastion.

When he found the player. He shoot the fire ball

They spawn in bastion

</details>



### Illager Castle

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Generate in Cherry Grove biome

Let's find out what secret hiding...

![Illager Castle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VfYVtIpr/images/19806300140d782f275cad031bb83ea248175be2.png)

</details>



### Credit

thanks TruffleHistorian for making structure!

Azzy help animation for tengu Falling animation and new mobs. and Mcfella help Viler Vex!
